authEntrypoints.description: Exchange a portal-issued one-time code for an app-local session
Returns the current authenticated session user

Receives portal-signed lifecycle events (session.revoked, user.provisioned, user.updated, user.offboarded). Verify the X-Portal-Signature header with the shared HMAC secret before acting on the envelope.

Machine-to-machine endpoint for relying-party apps to verify whether a portal session is still active. Substitute <portal-origin> with the value of the PORTAL_ORIGIN environment variable at deploy time (pilot: Cloud Run URL; production: https://coms.ahacommerce.net). Send { userId, sessionIssuedAt, appSlug } with header X-Portal-Introspect-Secret. Returns { active: false, revokedAt?, reason? } on revocation or { active: true, user } when valid. Apps SHOULD call this on sensitive operations and on a periodic background check cadence.

requestBody.sessionIssuedAt: ISO timestamp — when the app minted its local session
requestBody.appSlug: string — the relying party's own app slug

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_ORIGIN
requiredEnv.description: Origin of the COMS portal (e.g. the Cloud Run URL during pilot, https://coms.ahacommerce.net in production). Used to construct the broker origin, introspection endpoint, and deep-link bounce URLs. Do not hardcode — read from this env var.

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_BROKER_ORIGIN
requiredEnv.description: Origin of the COMS portal broker (should equal PORTAL_ORIGIN; kept for backward compatibility with existing adapter implementations)

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_TOKEN_AUDIENCE
requiredEnv.description: Audience expected from the brokered token

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_JWKS_URL
requiredEnv.description: JWKS endpoint or equivalent trust source for verifying brokered tokens

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_INTROSPECT_SECRET
requiredEnv.description: Shared secret sent in the X-Portal-Introspect-Secret header when calling POST /api/auth/broker/introspect. Must match the value set on the portal API. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET
requiredEnv.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret used to verify incoming portal lifecycle webhooks. Issued once when the portal admin registers your receiver URL; it is not shown again. Verify signature as: expected = 'sha256=' + hmac_sha256(secret, timestamp + '.' + raw_body); compare to the X-Portal-Signature header in constant time.

lifecycleWebhooks.description: Portal POSTs signed envelopes here when user or session state changes. See docs/external-app-integration-contract.md section 'Lifecycle webhooks' for verification recipe and payload shapes.
